# RemoteDesk Batch 15 Generated Files Manifest

## Introduction
This document serves as a manifest for all files generated as part of Batch 15 for the RemoteDesk enterprise SaaS project. It provides a comprehensive list of all new or updated files, categorized by their domain and type, along with a brief description of their content. This manifest ensures traceability and provides an organized overview of the deliverables.

## Batch Details
-   **Batch ID:** Batch 15
-   **Generation Date:** 2026-06-11
-   **Total Files Generated:** 40
